name: Garden Egg Stew
intro: 5-6 small-medium garden eggs or 2 large purple eggplants/ aubergines (cut into small bite- size pieces)

ingredients.item: 1/2 cup palm oil or coconut oil
vegetable stock cube Salt to taste

method: Heat the palm oil in a pot and add the stew base, tomato paste, garden eggs (or aubergine), iru, vegetable stock cube and salt. Bring to a boil then cover the pot and simmer on low heat for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot with steamed rice, yam, sweet potatoes, plantain, and other starches.
